title: Add a copy feature to the files coloumn , for example when opening a pdf I used to be able to right click on the white space of the pdf and copy
excerpt: as part of our process in 2023 we were able to open a pdf and right click on the white space of the pdf , this would give us a copy option … in 2024 this option disappeared and we are having to go through a longer   proc…

posts.author: JulianWollmann (Julian Wollmann)
posts.cookedHtml: as part of our process in 2023 we were able to open a pdf and right click on the white space of the pdf , this would give us a copy option … in 2024 this option disappeared and we are having to go through a longer process to import the pdf to import the PDF’s to our documents Via zooming out to get a full screenshot of the image

posts.author: YuvrajSingh (Yuvraj Singh Rajput)
posts.cookedHtml:
@JulianWollmann

You can use Copy Files Pro.

Using this app, you can seamlessly copy files between same item’s file column, different item’s file columns, and to items present on another board.
